testcase.name: test_super_admin_can_access_all_dashboards
testcase.failure:
Tests\Feature\Auth\RoleMiddlewareTest::test_super_admin_can_access_all_dashboards Expected response status code [200] but received 500. Failed asserting that 500 is identical to 200.
The following exception occurred during the last request:
